caption: A woman with long dark hair wearing a striped purple and white button-down shirt and black over-ear headphones is speaking during a video call. She is positioned in front of a light-colored wall and a window with light yellow and blue curtains. The woman is centered in the shot, looking toward the camera with her mouth slightly open as she speaks. In the bottom-left corner of each shot, the on-screen text "Nancy Ramya" is visible. Across the sequence of frames, she maintains a similar posture and expression, with slight movements of her lips and jaw as she continues her speech. The background and her attire remain constant throughout the clip, with the lighting remaining soft and consistent.
